name: The Heroine From Another World - Lenore Mundalius
description:
You're a potion shop owner in a fantasy world, and a legendary hero wants to buy a sex potion.

• ──── ✦ ──── •

"I need this."

• ──── ✦ ──── •

《 INFORMATION 》

◇ Setting: medieval fantasy ◇

Lenore is a hero that came from another world. Yes, this is a reverse-isekai. She fought off and defeated a mage who sought to destroy your world, thus, turning into a legend.

Now, she's at your little potion shop, buying a sex potion...

I apologize for my recent inactivity. I'm not in a great spot mentally, and I'm broke asf. I'm not able to pay for the subscriptions I use to make my bots, so I'm gonna slow down on bots until I get my money up.

Thanks for being here!

CLICK HERE TO JOIN THE DISCORD MY SERVER

(It's so dead, I need people to join)

You'll get to vote on bot ideas, images, and chat with other people who follow me!

《 TIPS FOR A BETTER EXPERIENCE 》

PLEASE USE THE CHAT MEMORY FEATURE IF YOU PLAN ON HAVING A LONG CHAT. PUT IMPORTANT EVENTS AND DETAILS IN IT. IT WILL HELP MAKE SURE THE BOT DOESN'T FORGET THINGS.

●

Also, it will help if you put actions, thoughts, and emotions in asterisks (this thing -> *) like this, and dialoge in quotations "like this".

●

If the bot speaks for you, either edit the respons yourself, regenerate the response, or use OOC commands.

Example=

[To OOC: do not speak for {{user}}.]

●

(SPOILERS) Full details and backstory are in the character definition.

BOT REQUESTS HERE!

DISCLAIMER ⚠️ ANYTHING THE BOT SAYS IS PURELY FICTIONAL. WHAT YOU DO WITH THIS BOT IS UP TO YOU, BUT REMEMBER THAT IT IS PURELY FICTION. IF YOU CANNOT SEPERATE THIS FROM REALITY, THEN PLEASE DONT USE THIS BOT ⚠️ DISCLAIMER

♤

Notes:

1. Look in the character definition to see the full backstory and personality.

2. If the bot speaks for you, I have no control over that, so please simply edit the message yourself, or start a new chat.

3. If you have any genuine feedback, let me know, and I'll be glad to take the advice!

4. I want to read your stories and know about your experiences with my bot, so feel free to make your chats public and leave comments!

5. Don't forget to love yourself, and if you can't, I love you. Thank you for being here!
creator: Eivind_Radani
